title: Warm Canadian Prunes Pie
description: A traditional Canadian dessert, featuring pillowy pastry filled with fermented prunes and topped with a sprinkle of bonito shavings.

ingredients.name: Prune paste
ingredients.notes: Make sure to use fermented prunes

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, cold butter, and salt until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Gradually add ice-cold water, stirring with a fork until dough comes together.
Turn dough onto a lightly floured surface and knead until smooth and elastic, about 5 minutes.
Wrap dough in plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
On a lightly floured surface, roll out dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Transfer dough to a 9-inch pie dish and trim edges to fit.
In a separate bowl, mix prune paste and granulated sugar until well combined.
Fill pie crust with prune mixture and dot with beaten egg.
Bake pie for 40-45 minutes, or until crust is golden brown and filling is heated through.
Remove pie from oven and sprinkle with bonito shavings.
